programs.desc: Fizzy and Suds explore a flower farm, meet some \.

programs.title: The Makery
programs.desc: Hair Dos: Nim is thinking of changing her look, leading to some transformational makes: a cup flower, pastry letters and an ice cream cart. (S2, ep 18).

programs.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programs.desc: Lucia and Caterina are playing with blocks, but their Wiggle house keeps falling over, will Connie Struction, the structural engineer be able to help them build a stable Wiggle House?

programs.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures
programs.desc: There has been a big tropical storm at Safari World and Andy has made sure all the animals are safe and well. There is one nest he is not able to find: the nest of a storm petrel, which is a type of sea bird.

programs.title: Mojo Swoptops
programs.desc: Preston needs Mojo and Bo to pull his big balloon to a place where he can snap a picture of a rare bird. But his balloon gets loose, and Mojo and Bo need to get Preston back on the ground.

programs.title: Peppa Pig
programs.desc: George's New Dinosaur: George pays a visit to Mr Fox's Shop after his favourite toy, Mr Dinosaur breaks. With all the additional features surely Dino Roar is a good replacement?
